title: Classic Music Disc
description: Classic Music Disc adds timeless masterpieces to Minecraft jukeboxes, including Vivaldi’s Four Seasons and Beethoven’s Für Elise. Experience elegance and immersion as classical music transforms your world.
body:
# 🎼 Classic Music Disc 

Bring the timeless beauty of **classical music** into Minecraft!  
With **Classic Music Disc**, your jukeboxes will play masterpieces that shaped music history.

Imagine mining deep underground while Beethoven’s _Für Elise_ echoes through the caverns, or relaxing at sunset in a village as Vivaldi’s violins paint the seasons of life.

This mod transforms music discs into true **works of art**, perfect for creating atmosphere, elegance, and immersion in your worlds.

***

### 🎶 Currently Included Tracks

**Antonio Vivaldi (1678 – 1741)**

*   _The Four Seasons_ (1725)
    
    *   _Spring_ (Concerto No.1 in E major, RV 269)
        
    *   _Summer_ (Concerto No.2 in G minor, RV 315)
        
    *   _Autumn_ (Concerto No.3 in F major, RV 293)
        
    *   _Winter_ (Concerto No.4 in F minor, RV 297)
        

**Ludwig van Beethoven (1770 – 1827)**

*   _Für Elise_ (Bagatelle in A minor, WoO 59, c.1810)**

# All classical music tracks in this mod have been sourced from Classicals.de
 (royalty-free classical music catalogue).
